records.question: Which airports have descriptions containing Cote d'Ivoire: Korhogo Airport?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT airports.code FROM airports
WHERE airports.description LIKE '%Cote d''Ivoire: Korhogo Airport%'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Code FROM Airports WHERE Description LIKE '%Cote d''Ivoire: Korhogo Airport%'
